body.title: Burn rate: tokens/hour + time-to-blackout at session start
body.result: added burn_rate() to context-load/run + Step 5.93 in SKILL.md; surfaces Burn: X%/hr (Y% used), ~Z min until pause at session start
body.description:
Compute burn rate from usage-cache.json at context-load: tokens consumed / elapsed hours in current 5h window = tokens/hour. Project forward: time until 90% threshold = actionable 'X minutes until pause.' Surface in context-load briefing as one line.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/context_load.py or equivalent context-load step; reads ~/.claude/usage-cache.json
**Design rules:** read-only; graceful degradation (cache missing = skip silently); no external calls
**Scope boundary:** in: burn rate computation, time-to-blackout projection, surface in briefing. out: enforcement (Granny already has threshold gate)
**Completion criteria:** (1) context-load briefing includes 'Burn rate: X tokens/hr, ~Y min until pause' when cache is available; (2) silent when cache missing; (3) verified against a real cache reading
